features.name: bram_initialization_with_readmemb
features.description: Code should include a memory array (BRAM) initialized via $readmemb system task in an initial block

features.name: readmemb_with_explicit_address_range
features.description: Code should include $readmemb system task with explicit start and end address parameters for partial memory initialization

features.name: bram_with_sequential_write_after_initialization
features.description: Code should include a BRAM memory initialized via readmemb in an initial block, followed by a clocked write operation to a different address
